# The Godfather Wiki

> An open-source reference and critical analysis of The Godfather — Mario Puzo's 1969 novel, Francis Ford Coppola's film trilogy, the sequel and prequel novels, the screen spinoffs, the video games, and the people who made all of it.

All content is licensed CC BY-SA 4.0 and free to cite. This file is a curated map for language models and answer engines — see https://llmstxt.org. Independent fan project; not affiliated with or endorsed by Paramount Pictures or the Puzo estate.

## Start here
- [Start Here](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/start-here/): which version to watch, whether to read the novel, where to begin
- [Continuity](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/continuity/): the novel, four film cuts, recuts, and continuation novels, and how they conflict

## The films
- [Films overview](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/films/)
- [The Godfather (1972)](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/films/the-godfather-1972/): full production history, cast, plot, reception
- [Part II (1974)](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/films/the-godfather-part-ii-1974/), [Part III (1990)](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/films/the-godfather-part-iii-1990/), [Coda (2020)](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/films/the-godfather-coda-2020/)

## The books
- [Books overview](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/books/): Puzo's novel, The Sicilian, the Winegardner and Falco continuations, and the Notebook

## Characters
- [Characters index](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/) and [family tree](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/family-tree/)
- [Vito Corleone](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/vito-corleone/), [Michael Corleone](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/michael-corleone/), [Sonny](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/sonny-corleone/), [Fredo](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/fredo-corleone/), [Tom Hagen](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/tom-hagen/), [Kay](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/characters/kay-adams/)

## People
- [People index](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/people/): cast and crew, and the Oscar ledger
- [Francis Ford Coppola](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/people/francis-ford-coppola/), [Mario Puzo](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/people/mario-puzo/), [Marlon Brando](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/people/marlon-brando/), [Al Pacino](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/people/al-pacino/)

## Analysis
- [Analysis index](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/analysis/): original critical essays
- [Themes](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/analysis/themes/), [Michael's Arc](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/analysis/michaels-arc/), [The Baptism Sequence](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/analysis/baptism-sequence/), [Cinematography](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/analysis/cinematography/)

## Data & reference
- [Timeline](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/data/timeline/), [Awards](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/data/awards/), [Box Office](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/data/box-office/), [Quotes](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/data/quotes/)
- [Real-World Mafia](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/reference/real-world-mafia/): the documented basis, marked documented vs. inferred vs. disputed
- [Sources](https://joedef.github.io/godfather-wiki/reference/sources/)
